features.path_conditions: of_node_put must be called on all paths after of_parse_phandle returns, including the error-return path when extcon_find_edev_by_node fails (IS_ERR check).
features.fit_test_reasoning: of_parse_phandle returns a refcounted device_node pointer that must be explicitly released. of_node_put is a refcount-release function (not data transformation). Missing of_node_put causes a refcount leak on error paths. Follows acquire->use->release semantics exactly.
